info.name: Travel Planner API
info.description: A management application that helps travellers plan trips and collect desired places to visit. Places are artworks from the Art Institute of Chicago.

item.name: Get a single place in a project

request.description: Retrieve a single place from the given project.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: basic
Added as a part of security scheme: basic

item.name: Update a place in a project

request.description:
Update notes or visited status for a place.
When all places in the project are marked as visited,
the project is automatically marked as completed.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: basic
Added as a part of security scheme: basic

item.name: List all places in a project

query.description: Search places by title, artist, or origin.
Maximum number of places to return.

request.description: Return all places associated with the given travel project.

query.description: Search places by title, artist, or origin.

item.name: Add a place to a project

request.description:
Add a new place (artwork) to an existing project.
The artwork must exist in the Art Institute of Chicago API.
A project may have at most 10 places; duplicate artworks are rejected.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: basic

request.description:
Create a travel project. Optionally include an array of place IDs (artworks)
to add to the project at creation time. Each place is validated against the
Art Institute of Chicago API.
